title: odontosoria retusa
intro: Odontosoria retusa is a species of fern native to Asia, belonging to the genus of climbing ferns in the family Lindsaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Odontosoria retusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in various folk remedies to treat various ailments.
